title: Artificial Palm Tree Artificial Silk Plant Fake Tree with White Tall Planter Faux Tropical Areca Floor Plant in Pot (1, White, 180 CM)
features: With Planter - Palm tree large fake plant with planter, no matter where tall fake plant is placed in your home, it is perfect. products that include all the essential components: a fake tree, a tall planter and artificial moss.

Adjustable Branch Designs: Constructed with stainless steel, our artificial trees exhibit exceptional flexibility and resistance to breakage. You can easily bend and adjust the branches according to your preferences, maintaining a consistent and picturesque shape. With leaves securely attached, these faux plants retain their beauty and integrity over time.

Year-Round Greenery: Our artificial tree for home decor indoor brings a refreshing touch of green to any space, capturing the beauty of summer and staying lush for years, unlike natural trees that wither in winter or scorch in summer.

Choose Artificial Trees: Artificial tree faux plants indoor are always dark green and full, with leaves never falling, maintenance free, no watering, no sunlight, or special care, will not fade or die, and will maintain its appearance and keep fresh all the year.
When there is much dust,just use a damp cloth or a duster to clean them. For outdoors, we recommend that avoid direct sunlight. Suitable for living room, dining room, office,or any building hall.
